WOWSlider.com
    
Welcome to the website for Boca Pointe residents and those interested in our community.

Boca Pointe is a 1000 acre master planned community located just outside the city limits of Boca Raton, in southern most Palm Beach County, Florida. It includes the Club at Boca Pointe, Boardwalk at SW 18th Street, and over 4,000 residences within 29 diversified Villages.

If you are a visitor to our community, please explore the links on this page. If you are a Boca Pointe resident, please log in to access all areas of the website. Residents registering for the first time should contact Access Control for the Community Code and then click on the “Not Registered Yet?” link above.

Copyright © 2025, Boca Pointe Community Association, All Rights Reserved

Welcome to the PGA National community!

Welcome to the PGA National community! Whether you are new to the area or have lived in PGA for many years, you will find helpful information on this site.

PGA is a 2,340-acre community comprised of almost 40 individual neighborhood associations. At the top of this page, you'll find a "COMMUNITIES" heading with general information about each of the neighborhoods in PGA National.

Distinguished Club of Florida
Platinum Club of the World
 
PARADISE FOUND
The Club at Admirals Cove is a private community located in Jupiter, FL, offering a world-class membership experience and an extensive range of amenities. These amenities include 45 holes of golf, tennis and pickleball courts, a private marina, a variety of dining options, modern wellness facilities, a private boutique hotel, and much more. It's a truly exceptional community where family life thrives, and members become lifelong friends, golfing and fishing buddies, and tennis partners. There is a unique sense of pride among those who are fortunate enough to spend time here.
